title: SuperForm - how to use Update feature for specific status only
excerpt: Can the SuperForm update feature be set/filtered to a specific status?  Help seems limited with this app.  I want the link sent to clients updating their project to go to ACTIVE status clients only.  It currently shows m…

posts.author: RMS (Rosanna Seabold)
posts.cookedHtml: Can the SuperForm update feature be set/filtered to a specific status? Help seems limited with this app. I want the link sent to clients updating their project to go to ACTIVE status clients only. It currently shows me every project within a board. Thank you ~
